title: PlayerLeaderBoards
description: Adds leaderboards for players to go for
body:
# 🏆 Transform Your Server with Dynamic Leaderboards

Elevate your Minecraft server experience with an advanced statistical tracking system that brings competitive spirit and community engagement to the forefront. This powerful solution creates stunning holographic displays and comprehensive player rankings that will keep your community coming back for more.

## ✨ Core Features

**Visual Excellence**: Deploy eye-catching holographic leaderboards that float majestically above your world, displaying real-time statistics with vibrant colors and professional formatting that captivates players instantly.

**Comprehensive Tracking**: Monitor three essential player metrics that matter most - elimination counts, total server engagement time, and chat participation levels. Every action is recorded from the moment of installation, building a complete statistical profile.

**Persistent Data Storage**: Advanced file-based storage system ensures no progress is ever lost. All statistics are automatically saved and backed up, with intelligent auto-save functionality preventing data loss during unexpected shutdowns.

**Flexible Display Options**: Choose between spectacular floating holograms for visual impact or clean chat-based leaderboards for quick reference. Perfect for spawn areas, competition zones, or any location where you want to showcase top performers.

**Real-Time Updates**: Statistics update instantly as players achieve new milestones, with seamless integration into your server's natural gameplay flow.

## 🎯 Why Choose This Solution?

**Community Building**: Nothing drives engagement like friendly competition. Watch as players naturally form rivalries, celebrate achievements, and strive to climb the rankings, creating a vibrant server atmosphere.

**Administrative Control**: Comprehensive permission system allows fine-tuned control over who can manage displays and access different features, ensuring your staff can maintain order while encouraging participation.

**Performance Optimized**: Lightweight design with minimal resource consumption ensures smooth operation even on busy servers. Asynchronous data operations prevent lag spikes during peak activity.

**Easy Management**: Simple commands make setup effortless. Deploy leaderboards exactly where you want them with single commands, and remove them just as easily when needed.

**Customizable Experience**: Extensive configuration options allow you to tailor the system to match your server's unique style and requirements.

## 🚀 Perfect For

- **PvP Servers**: Showcase the deadliest fighters and create legends around top eliminators
- **Survival Communities**: Celebrate dedicated players who invest the most time building and exploring
- **Social Hubs**: Highlight the most active community members and conversation starters
- **Mini-Game Networks**: Add competitive elements to any game mode with flexible ranking systems
- **Roleplay Servers**: Track character development and community involvement over time

## 📊 Advanced Statistics

The system meticulously tracks player performance across multiple dimensions, building comprehensive profiles that reflect true server contribution. From elimination streaks to dedication measurements, every metric contributes to a complete picture of player achievement.

## 🛠️ Technical Excellence

Built with modern Minecraft server architecture in mind, featuring robust error handling, efficient data structures, and clean code practices. The modular design ensures compatibility with other popular server modifications while maintaining independence and reliability.

## 💫 Installation & Setup

Drop into your plugins folder and restart - it's that simple. The system automatically creates necessary files and begins tracking immediately. No complex database setup, no external dependencies, just pure functionality ready to enhance your server.

## 🎮 Commands Overview

- `/spawnkillshologram` - Deploy elimination leaderboard
- `/spawnplaytimehologram` - Deploy engagement time rankings  
- `/spawnmessageshologram` - Deploy communication statistics
- `/removeholograms` - Clear all displays
- `/leaderboard [type]` - View rankings in chat

## 🔒 Permissions System

Granular permission controls ensure proper access management while allowing players to enjoy the competitive features without security concerns.

---

*Transform your server into a competitive community hub where every player's contribution is recognized and celebrated. Download now and watch your engagement metrics soar!*

**Recommended**: Paper 1.20+ for optimal performance
